omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Usage Data: We collect information about the products that you use and how you use them and your local device information, including but not limited to your device information (e.g. phone model and brand), operating system (system version, ID, and language), clicking and the URL that referred you to our Services.

-User Content: We may collect content that you create or upload through the Services, including prompts, text, images, audio, video recordings and chat history that you input, depending on the features you use.

Usage Data: We collect information about the products that you use and how you use them and your local device information, including but not limited to your device information (e.g. phone model and brand), operating system (system version, ID, and language), clicking and the URL that referred you to our Services.

Our partner firebase SDK will collect the following information from you: IP address, Users' names, Email addresses, iOS UDIDs, Secure Android IDs, Passwords, Phone numbers, User agents, Instance IDs, Crash traces, Breakpad minidump formatted data (NDK crashes only), Device specs (iOS). The above information will be used to uniquely identify the user to provide statistics and data analysis services. To learn more about the personal information protection of firebase currently involved in this situation, please click here. 【https://firebase.google.com/support/privacy】

Location Information: When you access our Services through a mobile device, such as a mobile phone, we may collect your location from your device for security reasons and to provide a better service experience.

• Account Information: We may ask that you provide certain information to us when you set up an account or profile on the Website, order the Application or contact us through the Website or Application for information or support. This information may include your email address, account name, or other personal identifier.

The prompts, text, images, audio recordings, videos and chat logs that you enter may be your personal sensitive data, and in order to provide you with certain features of our Services, we may collect, generate, access, store and use this sensitive information about you. We will only use this data to provide you with the applicable features, and by entering this sensitive information and sending us a request to generate it, you consent to us using it for the purposes set out in this Privacy Policy.
